# MarketplaceListing

> Public marketplace listing for partner integrations

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| partnerId | string | yes | - | Partner ID |
| integrationId | string | yes | - | Integration ID |
| name | string | yes | - | Listing name |
| description | string | yes | - | Listing description |
| category | string | yes | - | Listing category |
| pricing | json | yes | - | Pricing model (free, per-call, monthly) |
| featured | boolean | yes | false | Whether listing is featured |
| rating | float | yes | 0 | Average rating |
| installCount | integer | yes | 0 | Number of installs |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- belongsTo **Partner** (via `partnerId`)
- belongsTo **PartnerIntegration** (via `integrationId`)

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/marketplace-listing` — List all
- `POST /api/marketplace-listing` — Create
- `GET /api/marketplace-listing/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/marketplace-listing/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/marketplace-listing/:id` — Delete
